name: Women's Shiny Plastic Round Sunglasses - Universal Thread™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, Maximum UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Whether you're out for date, shopping or just fun, create an impactful look by accessorizing with the Shiny Plastic Round Sunglasses from Universal Thread™. These round sunglasses feature a black frame with gray lenses for a beautiful look. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. Made of 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these black sunglasses fit most faces.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
